scripts.dev: npm run db:start && concurrently "PORT=5001 cd backend && npm run dev" "wait-on http://localhost:5001/health --timeout 60000 && cd frontend && npm run dev"
scripts.dev:all: concurrently "npm run db:start" "wait-on tcp:27017 --timeout 30000 && PORT=5001 cd backend && npm run dev" "wait-on http://localhost:5001/health --timeout 90000 && cd frontend && npm run dev"
scripts.clean: npm run db:stop && docker system prune -f
